description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a cylindrical shape, tapering from a thick barrel to a narrower handle. The barrel end is wrapped tightly with a dark, textured material, possibly leather or tape, providing extra grip or reinforcement. The wood has a rich, medium-brown color with visible grain patterns, giving it a classic, rugged appearance. The handle is smooth and slightly rounded at the knob, which is unwrapped and shows the natural wood finish. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or decorative graphics on the bat. The overall look suggests a utilitarian, possibly hand-crafted or vintage style suitable for use in urban environments.
description: A medium-brown wooden baseball bat with a dark, textured wrap around the barrel and a smooth, unwrapped handle. The bat has a rugged, classic appearance with no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the dark wrap on the barrel and the smooth wooden handle.
description_view_1: End-on view of the barrel, emphasizing the circular, tightly wrapped end and the thickness of the bat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the length and the contrast between the wrapped barrel and the plain handle.
description_view_3: Handle-end view, focusing on the rounded wooden knob and the wrapped barrel in the background.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is simply the rounded end of the wooden bat, unadorned, with a smooth texture and no distinct markings or logos.
